title: The Last Orchard
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: One orchard stands between a community and starvation — but the last harvest is guarded by something worse than drought.
long_description: The collapse came quietly: crops failed first, then supply chains, then cities. Five years later, the survivors of a small farming collective tend the last producing orchard in three hundred miles. When a blight threatens the trees and a group of armed strangers appears on the ridge, the community must decide how far they will go to defend what remains. Told through the eyes of a father, his daughter, and the stranger who arrives with more questions than answers, The Last Orchard is a quiet, devastating novel about what survives after everything else is gone.
